prompt: Generate a structural graphic work around a specific theme. The subject is compressed into a large-scale monochromatic image field rather than a realistic object. Core shapes enter from the edges, crossing boundaries like fragments of a larger medium. The interior retains low-contrast image fragments, scan grain, halftone noise, and archival textures, with outer edges showing low-resolution mosaic steps and blocky fractures. The background uses high-brightness light-colored paper as a full field, cutting into the subject to create holes, paths, and negative space for reading pauses. Color maintains a three-layer functional relationship: large light background for breathing/cutting, large structural color for subject/pressure, and small high-contrast info color for titles/notes. The composition uses scale contrast between giant image fragments and tiny info points. Fonts are narrow modern sans-serif. Subject: Childhood of Hitler. Use: Infographic poster, ensuring all knowledge points are displayed. Ratio 16:9 landscape.
